suiteletscript.name: WOTree - Work Order Hierarchy Suitelet
suiteletscript.description: Lists Released Work Orders grouped by createdfrom hierarchy with inline Start Date editing.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Released Status Internal Value
scriptcustomfield.description: Internal value of the Work Order status field for "Released". Verify with wo_field_discovery_sl.js.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Released Status Display Labels (comma-separated)
scriptcustomfield.description: Display labels meaning "Released" across every NetSuite UI language your users have selected - this is the primary check, confirmed via diagnostic logging that getValue('status') returns a modern statusRef-style key that never matches the legacy internal key custscript_wo_status_released holds. French label confirmed as "Lancé" (not "Publié", an earlier unverified guess). Add a label here, no code change, if another user picks yet another language.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Assembly Item Search Join ID
scriptcustomfield.description: Search join id used to reach the assembly item's own fields from a Work Order search. Confirmed via wo_field_discovery_sl.js - "assemblyitem" fails as a join id in this account, "item" resolves.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Planning Item Category Field ID
scriptcustomfield.description: Standard field id on the Item record for "Planning Item Category" (no custitem_ prefix - it's a standard field, not custom). Verify with wo_field_discovery_sl.js.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Root Work Orders Per Page
scriptcustomfield.description: How many top-level (root) Work Orders to show per page.

scriptcustomfield.label: WOTree: Map/Reduce Script ID
scriptcustomfield.description: Script id of the Map/Reduce script that applies queued Start Date changes.
